---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem or gap this feature would address. What are you
trying to do that you currently cannot?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen. If you have a specific
design in mind, describe it here.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you thought about other approaches? Why do you prefer the one above?

## Scope

Which component does this affect?
- [ ] `markdown-reader` TUI
- [ ] `mermaid-text` library / CLI
- [ ] Both / general

## Additional Context

Mockups, references to similar tools, or any other context that would
help evaluate this request.
